metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the platform-engineering domain.

bricks.name: IDE Workspace and Local Developer Tooling
bricks.description: Provides the local engineering entry point through IDE setup, workspace bootstrapping, dev containers, local runtime helpers, and supported command-line workflows.

internalModules.title: Workspace Bootstrap Pack
internalModules.description: Defines local setup defaults, dev container standards, and common workstation dependencies.

internalModules.title: Local Runtime Helper Layer
internalModules.description: Provides wrappers, emulators, and local environment helpers that align workstation workflows with the supported platform path.

interfaces.title: IDE Extensions and Dev Container Definitions
interfaces.description: Configuration surface used by engineers to start supported local workspaces.

interfaces.title: CLI Bootstrap Workflows
interfaces.description: Commands used to initialize and maintain a supported local engineering setup.

brickDependencies.description: Uses Golden Path Templates to align local engineering setup with supported service patterns.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Security Posture And Runtime Protection to support domain workflows.
Queries Developer Portal And Service Catalog to support search, analytics, or decision flows.

bricks.name: Agentic Engineering and Coding Assistants
bricks.description: Provides AI-assisted coding, code explanation, workflow automation, and agent-driven engineering actions inside approved platform boundaries.

internalModules.title: Prompt and Policy Guardrails
internalModules.description: Controls which engineering actions, data, and workflow contexts assistant tools can access.

internalModules.title: Context and Repository Connectors
internalModules.description: Connects assistants to repositories, service metadata, docs, and platform workflows in a controlled way.

interfaces.title: IDE Copilot Surface
interfaces.description: Assistant features embedded in everyday coding workflows.

interfaces.title: Agent Workflow API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for bounded code and platform automation tasks.

brickDependencies.description: Builds on the supported IDE and local workspace surface to reach engineers inside daily workflows.
Uses policy controls to keep assistant actions aligned with engineering and security guardrails.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Version Control And Code Collaboration to support domain workflows.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Service Specification and Application Definition
bricks.description: Provides the declarative app and service definitions used to describe workloads, dependencies, topology, and lifecycle expectations in a platform-compatible way.

internalModules.title: Application Definition Schema
internalModules.description: Defines the supported metadata and runtime contract for services and applications.

internalModules.title: Validation and Translation Layer
internalModules.description: Checks and translates app definitions into the formats required by orchestration and delivery systems.

interfaces.title: Application Spec API
interfaces.description: API for registering, validating, and versioning supported app definitions.

interfaces.title: Specification Validation Workflow
interfaces.description: Workflow used to validate service and application definitions before rollout.

dataDependencies.description: Queries Developer Portal And Service Catalog to support search, analytics, or decision flows.

bricks.name: Developer Portal and Service Catalog
bricks.description: The front door to the platform, combining service catalog metadata, documentation, ownership, templates, and self-service actions.

internalModules.title: Service Metadata Model
internalModules.description: Stores service ownership, lifecycle state, dependency, and documentation metadata.

internalModules.title: Portal Experience Layer
internalModules.description: Provides browse, search, workflow, and support entry points for platform customers.

internalModules.title: Workflow Adapter Layer
internalModules.description: Connects the portal to provisioning, template, and governance workflows.

interfaces.title: Portal UI
interfaces.description: User interface for catalog, docs, ownership, and self-service actions.

interfaces.title: Catalog API
interfaces.description: API for service metadata, template actions, and platform workflow integration.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Events
interfaces.description: Events emitted for ownership, service, and workflow changes.

brickDependencies.description: Uses repository and ownership metadata from Version Control and Code Collaboration to keep the catalog current.
Uses Golden Path Templates to scaffold and evolve services.
Consumes usage signals to understand portal adoption and friction.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Customer Profile.
Writes or updates Customer Contact Point during domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Developer Portal And Service Catalog.

bricks.name: Golden Path Templates
bricks.description: Opinionated templates and reference implementations for common service, UI, and automation patterns used by product teams.

internalModules.title: Template Registry
internalModules.description: Stores versioned templates, documentation, and lifecycle states.

internalModules.title: Quality Validation Harness
internalModules.description: Tests whether templates remain deployable, secure, and usable.

internalModules.title: Migration Guidance Pack
internalModules.description: Explains how teams move from older patterns to newer supported paths.

interfaces.title: Scaffolding Actions
interfaces.description: Creates new services or platform assets from supported templates.

interfaces.title: Template Registry API
interfaces.description: API for discovering, versioning, and consuming templates.

brickDependencies.description: Uses supported application definitions so generated services carry the expected workload and dependency model.
Embeds supported delivery workflows into generated starting points.
Applies guardrails to supported templates by default.

dataDependencies.description: Queries Developer Portal And Service Catalog to support search, analytics, or decision flows.

bricks.name: Developer Experience and Workflow Telemetry
bricks.description: Measures adoption, onboarding friction, self-service completion, and engineering workflow effectiveness across the platform.

internalModules.title: Workflow Event Ingestion
internalModules.description: Captures events from the portal, pipelines, and platform workflows.

internalModules.title: DevEx Metrics Model
internalModules.description: Computes onboarding, cycle-time, and platform-value metrics.

interfaces.title: Platform Insights Dashboard
interfaces.description: Dashboard for adoption, lead-time, and friction metrics.

interfaces.title: Usage Metrics API
interfaces.description: API for platform health and usage analytics.

dataDependencies.description: Queries Developer Portal And Service Catalog to support search, analytics, or decision flows.

bricks.name: Version Control and Code Collaboration
bricks.description: Manages repositories, branching conventions, pull-request workflows, code ownership metadata, and collaboration patterns around source code.

internalModules.title: Repository Lifecycle Manager
internalModules.description: Creates and governs repositories, branch protections, and ownership defaults.

internalModules.title: Code Review and Ownership Policies
internalModules.description: Defines review requirements, approvals, and source-code accountability standards.

interfaces.title: Repository APIs and Webhooks
interfaces.description: Integration surface for repository events, metadata, and workflow triggers.

interfaces.title: Pull Request and Review Workflows
interfaces.description: User workflows for code review, merge control, and collaboration around source changes.

brickDependencies.description: Provides the source-control events and merge states that trigger CI and delivery workflows.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Version Control And Code Collaboration.
Reads Infrastructure As Code Control Plane to support domain workflows.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Artifact Registry and Image Distribution
bricks.description: Stores, distributes, and governs container images, packages, charts, and other deployable artifacts used across CI, CD, and runtime workflows.

internalModules.title: Registry Control Layer
internalModules.description: Handles artifact namespaces, permissions, retention, and replication policies.

internalModules.title: Artifact Distribution and Caching Layer
internalModules.description: Optimizes secure artifact pull and distribution across build and runtime environments.

interfaces.title: Registry API
interfaces.description: API used by build, deployment, and runtime systems to publish and consume deployable artifacts.

interfaces.title: Artifact Pull and Publish Workflows
interfaces.description: Standard workflows for pushing, promoting, and consuming versioned artifacts.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Artifact Registry And Image Distribution.
Reads Security Posture And Runtime Protection to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Delivery Pipelines and Release Automation
bricks.description: Reusable build, test, deploy, promote, and rollback workflows that encode the expected delivery path.

internalModules.title: Pipeline Library
internalModules.description: Stores reusable CI/CD workflows and quality gates.

internalModules.title: Release Evidence Store
internalModules.description: Captures deployment, promotion, and rollback evidence.

interfaces.title: Pipeline Actions
interfaces.description: Workflow actions used by teams to build, test, and deploy software.

interfaces.title: Release API
interfaces.description: API for promotion, rollback, and release evidence.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on trusted artifacts and provenance for secure releases.
Uses repository and merge-state events from Version Control and Code Collaboration to trigger and govern CI workflows.
Publishes build outputs and release artifacts into the standard artifact distribution path.
Runs required controls as part of the normal delivery path.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Version Control And Code Collaboration to support domain workflows.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Continuous Delivery and Deployment Promotion
bricks.description: Manages deployment promotion, progressive delivery, environment synchronization, and release-state control after CI has produced approved artifacts.

internalModules.title: Promotion Controller
internalModules.description: Controls artifact promotion and release progression across environments.

internalModules.title: Deployment State Reconciler
internalModules.description: Keeps desired deployment state aligned with actual environment state.

interfaces.title: Promotion Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for progressive rollout, deployment promotion, and rollback coordination.

interfaces.title: Deployment State Dashboard
interfaces.description: Operational view into release progression and environment synchronization.

brickDependencies.description: Uses release evidence and approved build outputs produced by CI workflows.
Consumes versioned artifacts from the standard registry path for deployment promotion.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Version Control And Code Collaboration to support domain workflows.
Reads Environment Provisioning And Ephemeral Environments to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Platform Orchestration and Resource Binding
bricks.description: Coordinates how application definitions, environment policies, and resource bindings turn into runnable workloads on the supported platform.

internalModules.title: Orchestration Graph Engine
internalModules.description: Resolves workloads, dependencies, resources, and environment-specific bindings into deployable plans.

internalModules.title: Resource Binding Resolver
internalModules.description: Maps application requirements to approved infrastructure and shared platform services.

interfaces.title: Orchestration API
interfaces.description: API used to generate deployment plans and resolve approved resource bindings.

interfaces.title: Binding Decision Events
interfaces.description: Events emitted when orchestration decisions and resource assignments change.

brickDependencies.description: Consumes application definitions that describe the intended workload and service topology.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Environment Provisioning And Ephemeral Environments to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Environment Provisioning and Ephemeral Environments
bricks.description: Automates creation and lifecycle management of developer, test, preview, and production environments with policy-aware defaults.

internalModules.title: Provisioning Control Plane
internalModules.description: Creates and updates environments from standard definitions.

internalModules.title: Environment Definition Library
internalModules.description: Stores reusable runtime configurations and supported environment types.

interfaces.title: Provisioning API
interfaces.description: API used to request or update environments.

interfaces.title: Environment Lifecycle Events
interfaces.description: Events emitted when environments are created, changed, or removed.

brickDependencies.description: Uses the platform orchestrator to resolve which resources and bindings belong in each environment.
Applies approved identity and access defaults when environments are provisioned.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Environment Provisioning And Ephemeral Environments.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.
Queries Developer Portal And Service Catalog to support search, analytics, or decision flows.

bricks.name: Infrastructure as Code Control Plane
bricks.description: Provides the reusable infrastructure-as-code workflows, state handling, and policy-aware execution model used to create and evolve platform resources safely.

internalModules.title: IaC Workflow Engine
internalModules.description: Executes infrastructure plans, applies state transitions, and coordinates change approvals.

internalModules.title: State and Drift Control Layer
internalModules.description: Stores infrastructure state and detects drift between declared and actual platform resources.

interfaces.title: Infrastructure Plan API
interfaces.description: API used to validate, plan, and apply infrastructure changes through approved workflows.

interfaces.title: Drift and Change Events
interfaces.description: Events emitted for infrastructure drift, apply status, and change outcomes.

brickDependencies.description: Uses policy controls to validate infrastructure definitions before changes are applied.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Infrastructure As Code Control Plane.
Reads Version Control And Code Collaboration to support domain workflows.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Runtime Connectivity and Integration Patterns
bricks.description: Defines approved runtime patterns for networking, service discovery, dependency access, and platform-service integration.

internalModules.title: Connectivity Policy Library
internalModules.description: Defines supported network and access patterns between services and shared dependencies.

internalModules.title: Reference Integration Pack
internalModules.description: Documents and automates common ways to connect to platform and infrastructure services.

interfaces.title: Runtime Pattern Catalog
interfaces.description: Catalog of approved integration and connectivity patterns.

interfaces.title: Network and Access Policies
interfaces.description: Policy interfaces consumed by runtime automation.

brickDependencies.description: Uses orchestration and resource-binding decisions to keep runtime connectivity patterns aligned with the deployed topology.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Code Quality and Static Analysis
bricks.description: Runs static analysis, code-quality checks, dependency review, and source-level engineering standards before code reaches the wider delivery path.

internalModules.title: Static Analysis Policy Pack
internalModules.description: Defines the supported quality gates and source-level review rules used across repositories.

internalModules.title: Quality Findings Aggregator
internalModules.description: Aggregates findings, ownership, and remediation status from multiple source-analysis tools.

interfaces.title: Quality Check APIs
interfaces.description: APIs used by CI workflows to run static analysis and fetch code-quality results.

interfaces.title: Quality Findings Dashboard
interfaces.description: Dashboard for code-health findings, trends, and ownership follow-up.

brickDependencies.description: Uses repository metadata and pull-request workflows to attach findings to the right engineering context.
Integrates quality checks into the standard CI path rather than leaving them as ad hoc repository setup.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Version Control And Code Collaboration to support domain workflows.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Identity, Secrets and Access Guardrails
bricks.description: Provides workload identity, secret delivery, least-privilege defaults, and access-control patterns used across the platform.

internalModules.title: Workload Identity Broker
internalModules.description: Issues and manages service identities and access bindings.

internalModules.title: Secret Delivery Integrations
internalModules.description: Distributes and rotates secrets through approved platform paths.

interfaces.title: Identity Policy API
interfaces.description: Used by provisioning and runtime systems to apply access rules.

interfaces.title: Secret Access Workflows
interfaces.description: Controlled workflows for secret creation, access, and rotation.

brickDependencies.description: Uses repository and ownership metadata to scope secrets, access policies, and service identity defaults.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Policy as Code and Compliance Controls
bricks.description: Encodes engineering, security, and compliance requirements into reusable checks, evidence, and exception workflows.

internalModules.title: Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates delivery and runtime policies against declared platform standards.

internalModules.title: Exception Workflow Manager
internalModules.description: Tracks, approves, expires, and audits policy exceptions.

internalModules.title: Evidence Collector
internalModules.description: Aggregates automated compliance evidence from pipelines and runtime systems.

interfaces.title: Policy Check API
interfaces.description: API used by templates, pipelines, and provisioning workflows.

interfaces.title: Control Evidence Dashboard
interfaces.description: Dashboard for control coverage and exception posture.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Policy As Code And Compliance Controls.
Reads Version Control And Code Collaboration to support domain workflows.
Reads Infrastructure As Code Control Plane to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Artifact Supply Chain and Base Images
bricks.description: Manages trusted build artifacts, base images, provenance, and update workflows for secure software delivery.

internalModules.title: Trusted Base Image Factory
internalModules.description: Builds, scans, and publishes approved runtime bases.

internalModules.title: Artifact Provenance Service
internalModules.description: Stores signatures, attestations, and lineage for released artifacts.

interfaces.title: Artifact Registry API
interfaces.description: Registry access for trusted images, packages, and provenance metadata.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Artifact Registry And Image Distribution to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Security Posture and Runtime Protection
bricks.description: Provides workload posture assessment, runtime protection signals, and cross-platform security visibility beyond source-level or policy-only checks.

internalModules.title: Runtime Posture Collector
internalModules.description: Collects posture, configuration, and threat signals from workloads and platform resources.

internalModules.title: Security Findings Correlator
internalModules.description: Connects posture findings to services, environments, and owners for action.

interfaces.title: Posture Findings API
interfaces.description: API for querying security posture, risk signals, and workload findings.

interfaces.title: Security Operations Dashboard
interfaces.description: Dashboard for runtime posture, misconfiguration, and cross-environment risk trends.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared telemetry signals to correlate runtime security and operational events.
Relies on workload identity context to interpret and govern runtime risk posture.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Security Posture And Runtime Protection.
Reads Policy As Code And Compliance Controls to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Observability and Telemetry Foundation
bricks.description: Shared logging, metrics, tracing, alerting, and dashboarding foundation used across services and platform workflows.

internalModules.title: Telemetry Collection Layer
internalModules.description: Collects and routes logs, metrics, and traces from services and platform systems.

internalModules.title: Dashboard and Alert Model
internalModules.description: Defines standard dashboards, alerts, and service-health views.

interfaces.title: Telemetry APIs

interfaces.title: Operations Dashboards
interfaces.description: Operational visibility into service and platform health.

bricks.description: Coordinates incidents, runbooks, rollback patterns, ownership, and follow-up automation across the platform estate.

internalModules.title: Incident Router
internalModules.description: Routes alerts and incidents using service ownership and severity policies.

internalModules.title: Automation and Runbook Engine
internalModules.description: Runs supported remediation, rollback, and notification actions.

interfaces.title: Incident Event Stream
interfaces.description: Events for alerts, incidents, and response lifecycle changes.

interfaces.title: Runbook Workflow API
interfaces.description: Automation entry points for response and remediation actions.

bricks.name: Cost, Capacity and Usage Insights
bricks.description: Provides cost, capacity, adoption, and value signals that help teams understand the economic effect of platform usage and runtime decisions.

internalModules.title: Cost Attribution Model
internalModules.description: Maps platform and runtime costs to teams, services, and environments.

internalModules.title: Usage Insight Layer
internalModules.description: Explains adoption, environment usage, and idle-spend patterns.

interfaces.description: Dashboard showing economic and usage signals across platform products.
